productDisplayName: Puma Men Evo Ducati Mid Black Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Evo Ducati Mid shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes that carry the Ducati edge are great for regular wear since their attractive high collar design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Combination of synthetic leather and suede uppers for durability and protection Mesh tongue for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort cat logo appliqued on the tongue and cat logo printed behind collar Appliqued formstripes on the sides Cupsole for added comfort Ducati brand tab on the side and engraved on the heel Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning EVA midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole for greater traction Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree movement Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet
